description: Create a full-layout content slide titled The Technology with a text block and bullet list on generative AI workforce reinvention, plus footer metadata.

main.body: Generative AI is the driving force behind today’s workforce reinvention. It is enabling more general-purpose, flexible, and smart automation techniques, vastly expanding the type of tasks that can be automated. And importantly, it’s democratizing these techniques, transforming who can be empowered to wield this autonomy to drive enterprise growth.

footer.source: Technology Vision 2025 | AI: A Declaration of Autonomy | The New Learning Loop
